passage:
NOTICE TO ALL EMPLOYEES

The staff cafeteria will be closed for renovations from Monday, October 10th to Friday, October 14th. During this time, a temporary coffee cart will be available in the main lobby from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM. We apologize for the inconvenience and look forward to opening our new, expanded dining area on October 17th.

questions.question: How long will the cafeteria be closed?
questions.explanation: From Monday to Friday is five days.

questions.question: What is provided as an alternative?
options: A coffee cart in the lobby
questions.explanation: The notice states a temporary coffee cart will be available in the main lobby.
